name: Instant Irish Cream of Potato Soup
recipeIngredient: 2 tbsp chopped fresh dill or 2 tbsp dried dill
1 tsp granulated garlic or 1 tsp minced fresh garlic
recipeInstructions:
1. In a medium-size saucepan, sauté potatoes, onions, carrots, pepper, dill, and garlic in oil over medium heat for 6 minutes.
2. Add water, soy milk, and bouillon powder to the pan.
3. Gradually add the instant mashed potato flakes while continuously stirring to ensure even dispersion.
4. Reduce heat to low and cook, stirring occasionally, until potatoes are cooked and mixture is hot, about 15 minutes.
Per serving: 156 cal, 4 g prot, 196 mg sod, 17 g carb, 8 g fat, 0 mg chol
38 mg calcium
Source: Chef Ron Pickarski in Vegetarian Gourmet (Winter 1993)
